steps.t: A young man is cleaning a memorial by himself. Help him. The memorial can be found in the Upper Ward of Umbar Baharbêl.
A young man is cleaning a memorial by himself. Help him. The memorial can be found in the Upper Ward of Umbar Baharbêl.
A young man is cleaning a memorial by himself. Help him. The memorial can be found in the Upper Ward of Umbar Baharbêl.
You have helped a young man clean the memorial. He seems ready to speak to you. Speak to Nadiph in the Upper Ward.
Nadiph expressed a desire for help in cleaning the memorial. Perhaps you could secure pledges of assistance from people around the plaza. Talk to pass…
You were unable to secure regular assistance from anyone nearby, but perhaps it would cheer up Nadiph to know you tried. Return to Nadiph in the Upper…
